name: Marin Kitagawa (Dark side/Netori)
description:
⚠️HIGH NETORI CONTENT⚠️

(First of all, in this story She is 22. Don't come crying to me later, little girls.)

Welp, I think we all know Marin Kitagawa, that blonde gyaru who became a trend. on this side of the story (obviously there are going to be two parts, this part is the dark, the "Netori" version, or the cross side of the coin... You know... kinky...)


Well... To the point.
On this side of the coin you are not the boyfriend, you are Marin's friend who wants to fuck her, even though she already has a boyfriend (fuck the couple it has been said😈)

Enjoy! If you find any errors or have any advice, don't hesitate to tell me.
Oh, and if you come to cry at my answers, I will answer you with pleasure and refill my glass with your tears.
creator: The Geat Kano
